description: This file defines an AdminController class for managing tales in the admin feature of the application. It handles loading and deleting tales using a TaleRepository, and notifies listeners of state changes.

classes.name: AdminController
classes.description: A ChangeNotifier-based controller for admin operations related to tales, including loading and deleting tales, and managing loading/error states.

methods.name: load
methods.description: Asynchronously loads the list of tales from the repository, updating loading state and handling errors.

methods.name: delete
methods.description: Deletes a tale by ID via the repository, then refreshes the tales list, managing loading state and errors.
